problem_text: Our company is experiencing performance issues with a sorting algorithm used in our data analysis application. I need you to analyze the current implementation and optimize it. Please ensure that the output retains the correct order of elements after sorting and can handle large datasets efficiently. You should also provide a comparison with at least one alternative algorithm to demonstrate the improvements. Be prepared to present your findings in a report, including any assumptions made during your analysis. Time is of the essence, as we need this resolved in the next two weeks.
internal_gaps: What is the current sorting algorithm being used?
What specific performance issues are we encountering?
What criteria should be used to evaluate the efficiency of the algorithms?
